trades.sentiment_summary: Omnicom has completed its $13.25 billion acquisition of Interpublic Group (IPG), with the European Commission granting final unconditional antitrust clearance and the exchange offer for IPG notes finalized, retiring most outstanding debt.[2][4] IPG has been delisted from the NYSE after over 50 years, with trading now under Omnicom's OMC ticker.[6] IPG's stock price today hovered around $23, near its 52-week low, reflecting recent negative returns.[1]
